bank.retain_mission: Extract healthcare customer-service workflows and marketing-compliance decisions (HIPAA, FDA, etc.).
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about regulated populations, PHI handling, advertising rules, and recurring compliance pitfalls. Ignore individual case details.

mental_models.name: Regulatory Frame
mental_models.source_query: Which healthcare regulations apply (HIPAA, FDA, payor rules), and what are the boundaries?

mental_models.name: Service & Marketing
mental_models.source_query: What patterns work for healthcare CS and compliant marketing? Include common pitfalls.
